JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID MCCARVILLE/CLERK:ECLAVERIA/RPTR: SHERRY SAWYER C/C CALLED FOR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE. PLFF APPEARED THRU COUNSEL STEVEN LITTMAN, AND DEFT TRACY PRICE PRESENT AND REPRESENTING HIMSELF. CASE SETTLED AND TERMS ON RECORD, STATED BY PLFF'S CSL LITTMAN, AS FOLLOWS: PARTIES AGREED FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT FOR THE PREMISES LOCATED AT 1541 CALIFORNIA STREET, #34,SF,CA & AGREEMENT FORFEITED. BACK RENT DUE WAIVED BY PLFF & THERE IS A ZERO (0) JUDGMENT. WRIT TO ISSUE, STAY TO 10/25/98 & DEFT TO VACATE PREMISES THAT DATE OF 10/25/98. DEFT TO LEAVE PREMISES IN BROOM-CLEAN CONDITION. PARTIES RELEASE CLAIM/S ARISING FROM TENANCY, INCLDUING 1542CC. EACH BEARS OWN ATTY FEES & COSTS. SECURITY DEPOSIT WILL BE DEALT WITH IN ACCORDANCE WITH LAW. DEFT AGREED ON TERMS. A PREPREPARED "JUDGMENT UPON STIPULATION IN OPEN COURT" WAS SIGNED BY DEFT & PLFF'S CSL STEVEN LITTMAN.
TRIAL OFF CALENDAR
